_comment: Loop-only MCP config for headless passes. The runner passes this via TICKET_LOOP_MCP_CONFIG + --strict-mcp-config, so the loop uses ONLY this — NOT the repo's OAuth-based .mcp.json. Linear's hosted MCP accepts a static API key in the Authorization: Bearer header (linear.app/docs/mcp), which removes the interactive-OAuth requirement for unattended runs. LINEAR_API_KEY is sourced from agent.env (600, never read by Claude) and expanded by Claude Code at load time. Swap this block for another tracker's MCP server + its key env-var to change providers.
